scores.correctness_notes: Correctly demonstrates the requires side using IngressPerAppRequirer from charms.traefik_k8s.v2.ingress, consistent with what the gold standard acknowledges. Includes charmcraft.yaml config, Python class setup, events, and deployment steps.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — IngressPerAppRequirer, IngressPerAppReadyEvent, IngressPerAppRevokedEvent are confirmed real classes. Constructor params (port, strip_prefix, redirect_https, scheme) and properties/methods (url, is_ready(), provide_ingress_requirements()) are all genuine traefik-k8s library APIs.
